scripts.start: concurrently -n api,mobile -c blue,green "npm run start:api" "wait-on tcp:3000 && npm run start:mobile"
scripts.lint: concurrently "npm run lint --prefix api" "npm run lint --prefix mobile"
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix api && npm install --prefix mobile && npm run docker:up
